department: Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office

external_services.service_name: Releasing of Confiscated Goods and/or Items
external_services.office: Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office
external_services.who_may_avail: Illegal Vendors whose goods were confiscated

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Proof of ownership of goods confiscated

steps.client_step: 1. Present ID and proof of ownership of confiscated goods
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive documents; 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI / Administrative Aide II

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to the Lipa City Treasurer's Office and pay penalty
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
3. Record payment and inform OCMD/TMD to prepare items for release
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI / Administrative Aide II

steps.client_step: 4. Proceed to TMD Office and present proof of payment/ownership

total.fees: P500.00 to P5,000.00 (depending on offense count)
